Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 28}Sylphid Aura is a support skill that {f 0 1 2}automatically raises the Defense and Accuracy/Evasion{f 0 1 27} of the {f 0 1 2}whole party{f 0 1 27} at the beginning of combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The effect duration {f 0 1 2}lasts between floors{f 0 1 27}, but will be canceled {f 0 1 2}after entering battle{f 0 1 27}. It is best utilized before decisive battles and key encounters.[n]{f 1 1}
